headerTitle: Forward Deployed Engineer  ·  Conversational AI Agents  ·  Enterprise Agentic Systems  ·  Production at Scale
subjectText: Forward Deployed Engineer — NICE (Remote US) · Conversational AI & Enterprise Agent Deployment
intro: NICE is building production-ready conversational AI agents that outperform human operators at scale. The FDE owns the full lifecycle — pilot through launch. Six complete deployment cycles, 14 live endpoints.
bullets: Full lifecycle AI agent ownership — pilot through production handoff. 14 live endpoints using Claude, GPT-4o, and Gemini with multi-model routing, MCP protocol, HITL confirm-before-execute, and agentic workflow orchestration. Production-ready is the only mode.

Conversational AI and voice automation in production — Twilio IVR with AI-powered call routing, dynamic script generation via Claude API, and ElevenLabs TTS voice synthesis. Handling real inbound call volume for a live home services business.

TypeScript + React full-stack, enterprise stakeholder fluency — 13 production platforms, 100+ API routes, BullMQ + Redis. Six engagements where the primary relationship was with department heads and C-suite executives, not technical teams.
matchNotes: Strong on AI agent production lifecycle, conversational AI (Twilio IVR + TTS), and TypeScript/React. Go is a gap. No formal NICE CX platform experience but enterprise agent deployment pattern is direct. Startup/founder mentality = genuine match.
